question: 1. Write a stored procedure to display 'Hello Oracle' using DBMS_OUTPUT.
2. Procedure that takes empno as an IN parameter and displays name and salary.
3. Procedure to display all employees working in a specific department.
4. Procedure that takes salary as input and displays earners more than that.
5. Procedure with an OUT parameter to return salary of a specific employee.
6. Procedure with IN OUT parameter (Accepts salary, increases by 10%).
7. Write a stored procedure to insert a new record into the EMP table.
8. Write a stored procedure to update an employee salary based on empno.
9. Write a stored procedure to delete an employee record safely.
10. Increase salary of all employees by a given percentage.
11. Transfer an employee from one department to another.
12. Procedure to display top 5 highest-paid employees using a cursor.
13. Implement transaction logic using COMMIT and ROLLBACK.
14. Function to return the square of a given number.
15. Function to return employee salary when empno is provided.
16. Function to return total count of employees.
17. Function to return maximum salary in company.
18. Function to return Department Name (dname) by deptno.
19. Function to calculate 15% bonus based on salary.
20. Function to return performance grade (A, B, C).
